resume_text:
FAISAL M N
SUMMARY
Dedicated Network Engineer with 2+ years of experience in deploying and managing enterprise
wired and wireless networks. Skilled in Aruba, Juniper and Cisco devices, with a focus on Aruba
solutions. Expertise in Ekahau tools for Wi-Fi heatmap design and wireless surveys. Proficient in
end-to-end network implementation, troubleshooting, and performance optimization.
WORK EXPERIENCE
TOOLS USED
Monitoring and Managing: Aruba Central AOS 10, Juniper Mist, Cisco Meraki, Forti-Manager
Network Design and Survey: Ekahau , Hamina
HLD and LLD: Microsoft Visio
Device Configuration / CLI Access: Putty, TeratermCurrently working as a Network Engineer (L2) at Airowire Networks Pvt. Ltd., with over 2
years of hands-on experience in enterprise networking.
Experienced in wired and wireless network design, deployment, and troubleshooting across
multiple customer environments.
Proficient in Aruba Central Cloud Platform, Juniper Mist, Aruba Switches, Controllers and
Aruba Access Points — including configuration, monitoring, and maintenance.
Strong expertise in Wi-Fi heatmap design, RF analysis, and site surveys using the Ekahau
Design and Analyzer tools.
Played a key role in end-to-end project execution, from initial implementation to testing,
validation, and go-live.
Managed multiple projects for clients covering wired & wireless deployment.
Troubleshooted & resolved network issues, ensuring minimal downtime and optimal
performance.
Prepared and maintained detailed documentation including High-Level Design (HLD) and
Low-Level Design (LLD) based on customer requirements, using Microsoft Visio.
Assisted in large-scale wireless rollout projects, ensuring optimal coverage and performance
tuning.
Exposure to Cisco and Juniper devices through active involvement in configuration, testing,
and deployment with senior engineers.
Skilled in network troubleshooting, VLAN configuration, Stacking (VSX/VSF), ACL, VRRP,
Controllers, Switching, IAP and Wireless optimization to ensure seamless user experience.A i r o w i r e  N e t w o r k s  P v t  L t d O c t   2 0 2 3  -  P r e s e n t
Network Engineer II
faizsahil8@gmail.com • 7204759397 • Bengaluru, Karnataka • LinkedIn

SOFT SKILLS
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Strong customer support and client interaction abilities
Analytical thinking and problem-solving mindset
Quick adaptability and decision-making skills
Proactive approach with a focus on continuous improvement
Effective multitasking and time management
Teamwork and collaboration
Quick learner with a great approach to adapting new technologiesEDUCATION

jd_text:
Job Title: Network L3 Engineer. Location: Vadodara / Bengaluru. Job Type: Full Time / Onsite. Department: IT Infrastructure. Shifts: Rotational. Experience Required: 5+ years.

Required Skills: 1. Advanced Networking Protocols:Deep understanding of TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, EIGRP, MPLS, ISIS. Routing and switching concepts at an expert level, 2. Network Design and Architecture:Experience designing scalable, high-availability network infrastructures. Capacity planning and performance optimization, 3. Firewall and Security:Proficient with firewalls (e.g., Palo Alto, Fortinet, Cisco ASA). VPNs (IPSec, SSL), ACLs, NAT, IDS/IPS, 4. Load Balancing and Redundancy:Knowledge of F5, Citrix NetScaler, or similar appliances. HA protocols like HSRP, VRRP, GLBP, 5. Network Monitoring and Troubleshooting:Tools: Wireshark, SolarWinds, Nagios, PRTG & Strong analytical skills for packet capture analysis. Core Data Center Network Skills, 1. High-Level Routing & Switching:Deep understanding of Layer 2/3 protocols: STP, VTP, HSRP, VRRP, BGP, OSPF, VXLAN. Fabric Path, OTV, and other data center-specific technologies, 2. Data Center Network Design:Spine-leaf architecture. Layer 2/3 segmentation and scalable designs. Multitenancy (VRF, VLANs, overlay/underlay networks), 3. Data Center Technologies:Cisco Nexus (5k/7k/9k) platforms. ACI (Application Centric Infrastructure). Juniper QFX/EX, Arista platforms. EVPN/VXLAN for modern data center fabrics, and 4. Security & Segmentation:Micro segmentation (e.g., using Cisco ACI or NSX). Integration with firewalls and network access control (NAC).

Good to Have Skills: Relevant industry certifications such as CCNP, JNCIP, ITIL or equivalent are highly preferred.

Job Description: Job Summary: The Network L3 Engineer will be responsible for maintaining, troubleshooting, and optimizing our advanced network infrastructure for our client(s). This role requires a deep understanding of networking protocols, strong problem-solving skills, and the ability to work under pressure to resolve complex network issues. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with multi-vendor network equipment, excellent communication skills, and a proactive approach to continuous improvement.

Must have Core Technical Skills –: 1. Advanced Networking Protocols: Deep understanding of TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, EIGRP, MPLS, ISIS. Routing and switching concepts at an expert level 2. Network Design and Architecture: Experience designing scalable, high-availability network infrastructures. Capacity planning and performance optimization 3. Firewall and Security: Proficient with firewalls (e.g., Palo Alto, Fortinet, Cisco ASA). VPNs (IPSec, SSL), ACLs, NAT, IDS/IPS 4. Load Balancing and Redundancy: Knowledge of F5, Citrix NetScaler, or similar appliances. HA protocols like HSRP, VRRP, GLBP 5. Network Monitoring and Troubleshooting: Tools: Wireshark, SolarWinds, Nagios, PRTG & Strong analytical skills for packet capture analysis. Core Data Center Network Skills.

Good to have Core Technical Skills –: 1. High-Level Routing & Switching: Deep understanding of Layer 2/3 protocols: STP, VTP, HSRP, VRRP, BGP, OSPF, VXLAN. Fabric Path, OTV, and other data center-specific technologies 2. Data Center Network Design: Spine-leaf architecture. Layer 2/3 segmentation and scalable designs. Multitenancy (VRF, VLANs, overlay/underlay networks). 3. Data Center Technologies: Cisco Nexus (5k/7k/9k) platforms. ACI (Application Centric Infrastructure). Juniper QFX/EX, Arista platforms. EVPN/VXLAN for modern data center fabrics 4. Security & Segmentation: Micro segmentation (e.g., using Cisco ACI or NSX). Integration with firewalls and network access control (NAC)

Key Responsibilities: Hands-on experience on Network Technologies – Routing, Switching, Firewall, Load Balancers, Wireless Network, Experience on Network designing, Architecting, Troubleshooting, Integrations, Ability to troubleshoot complex issues within defined timelines, Strong expertise in core and edge IP routing technologies (IPv4 and IPv6, BGP, OSPF, MPLS – RSVP, LDP, etc. / VPLS / VPWS, IP VPN, QoS, Security), Hands-on experience on Cisco Nexus, ASR/ISR, SDN, SD-WAN, IPSEC, SWITCHING, Hands-on experience on Network & Server Load Balancer, Wan Optimization devices, Hands-On experience on Next-Gen Firewalls like Palo Alto, Cisco FP features, and Knowledge of VPN, MPLS, ILL, L2/L3 Circuits configuration/Troubleshooting’s.

Education Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.

Certifications: Relevant industry certifications such as CCNP, JNCIP, ITIL or equivalent are highly preferred.
